title: OpenSDK sdk.json
description: Declarative configuration for generating SDKs with the OpenSDK CLI.

sdkName.description: Default SDK name passed to the converter.

behavior.description: Global runtime behavior (deep-merged over the canonical defaults).

publish.description: Global publish target (defaults; a language section `publish` overrides it).

SdkBehavior.description: Declarative runtime behavior of the generated SDK. One source of truth for what every language's runtime does; emitters interpolate these values instead of hardcoding them.

RetryPolicy.description: Automatic retry behavior. Delay per attempt: min(initialDelayMs * multiplier^attempt, maxDelayMs), +/- jitter fraction; a Retry-After response header wins when honorRetryAfterHeader is true.

maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts after the first request

retryableStatusCodes.description: HTTP status codes that trigger a retry

honorRetryAfterHeader.description: Whether a Retry-After response header overrides the computed backoff

maxDelayMs.description: Upper bound on the computed delay

jitter.description: Random jitter fraction (0..1) applied to each delay

defaultTimeoutMs.description: Default per-request timeout; 0 means no deadline

timeoutEnvVar.description: Environment variable that overrides the default timeout (milliseconds)

ErrorPolicy.description: Maps HTTP statuses to named error kinds; every language raises/returns its idiomatic form of the same kind.

errorDocUrlTemplate.description: URL template for error docs (e.g. https://api.example.com/errors/{kind})

includeRuntimeVersion.description: Append the language runtime version (go1.22, python/3.12)

aiAgentEnvVars.description: Env var -> agent slug; when set at runtime the slug is appended to the UA for agent-traffic attribution

requestIdHeader.description: Response header carrying the request id, surfaced on errors

headerName.description: Request header carrying client telemetry (previous request id + latency)

enabledByDefault.description: Whether the client-telemetry loop is on by default

events.description: Closed lifecycle-event vocabulary every runtime must emit (request.start, request.success, request.retry, request.rate_limited, request.error, request.connection_error)

autoGenerateForPost.description: Auto-generate a key for retried POSTs on methods flagged injectIdempotencyKey

optionKeys.description: Request-option keys that must never appear inside request params (fail fast if seen)

PublishTarget.description: How this SDK is published: package identity (merged onto spec.info) + registry mechanics.

registry.description: Registry URL to publish to (npm registry, PyPI repository-url, NuGet source, ...).

tokenEnv.description: Env var name holding the auth token (read at publish time; never stored).

packageName.description: Registry package name override (else the emitter's derived name).

GoSection.description: Options for the go SDK target.

output.description: Output directory for this language's generated SDK.

behavior.description: Per-language behavior, deep-merged over the global `behavior`.

baseURL.description: Default API base URL baked into the runtime (default: the first `servers` entry).

tests.description: Emit the SDK's own test suite (default: true).

publish.description: Per-language publish target, merged over the global `publish`.

packageName.description: Go package name for the SDK root (default: from info.title).

PythonSection.description: Options for the python SDK target.

output.description: Output directory for this language's generated SDK.

behavior.description: Per-language behavior, deep-merged over the global `behavior`.

baseURL.description: Default API base URL baked into the runtime (default: the first `servers` entry).

tests.description: Emit the SDK's own test suite (default: true).

publish.description: Per-language publish target, merged over the global `publish`.

packageName.description: The Python package name (default: snake_case of info.title).

NodeSection.description: Options for the node SDK target.

output.description: Output directory for this language's generated SDK.

behavior.description: Per-language behavior, deep-merged over the global `behavior`.

baseURL.description: Default API base URL baked into the runtime (default: the first `servers` entry).

tests.description: Emit the SDK's own test suite (default: true).

publish.description: Per-language publish target, merged over the global `publish`.

packageName.description: npm package name (default: kebab-case of info.title).

envVar.description: Env var the client reads the credential from (default: the scheme envVar / <PKG>_API_KEY).

RubySection.description: Options for the ruby SDK target.

output.description: Output directory for this language's generated SDK.

behavior.description: Per-language behavior, deep-merged over the global `behavior`.

baseURL.description: Default API base URL baked into the runtime (default: the first `servers` entry).

tests.description: Emit the SDK's own test suite (default: true).

publish.description: Per-language publish target, merged over the global `publish`.

packageName.description: The Ruby gem / package name (default: snake_case of info.title).

moduleName.description: The top-level Ruby module/namespace (default: PascalCase of info.title).

JavaSection.description: Options for the java SDK target.

output.description: Output directory for this language's generated SDK.

behavior.description: Per-language behavior, deep-merged over the global `behavior`.

baseURL.description: Default API base URL baked into the runtime (default: the first `servers` entry).

tests.description: Emit the SDK's own test suite (default: true).

publish.description: Per-language publish target, merged over the global `publish`.

packageName.description: The leaf Java package segment (default: from info.title).

basePackage.description: The Java package prefix the SDK nests under (default: "com.example").

DotnetSection.description: Options for the dotnet SDK target.

output.description: Output directory for this language's generated SDK.

behavior.description: Per-language behavior, deep-merged over the global `behavior`.

baseURL.description: Default API base URL baked into the runtime (default: the first `servers` entry).

tests.description: Emit the SDK's own test suite (default: true).

publish.description: Per-language publish target, merged over the global `publish`.

sdkName.description: The SDK name — drives the .csproj filename and the <Sdk>Client class (default: PascalCase of info.title).

namespace.description: Root namespace for every emitted type (default: Example.<Sdk>).
